name: Afternoon Pullback + EMA Slope + Profit Ladder
rationale: XB-ORB fires morning/midday. Afternoon is the biggest session gap. Use proven exit+filter with afternoon entry logic.

name: VWAP Pullback MR + Vol Filter + Trailing Stop
rationale: XB-ORB is a trend/breakout strategy. A mean-reversion workhorse on the same assets would diversify regime exposure.

name: Vol Squeeze Breakout + Session Filter + Profit Ladder
rationale: Tests whether the proven exit (profit ladder) works with a different entry mechanism (squeeze vs ORB).

name: Commodity-Specific Crossbreed
rationale: Test whether commodity-specific entry/filter components improve on generic XB-ORB when applied to their native asset.
